message:
fix: Agent creation path and SQLite binding validation - v2.7.41

- Fix agent-copier.js path from ../../../../ to ../../.claude/agents
- Add SQLite binding test before database initialization
- Graceful fallback to JSON when native bindings unavailable
- Remove duplicate "Initializing Hive Mind System" message

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
